name: [WIP] Realtime Sun Shadows
author: automata-rtx
description: Scene-wide dynamic sun and moon shadows: the opaque world is re-rendered from the light into cascaded shadow maps (up to 3 nested boxes, near sharp to far wide, cross-faded at the boundaries) plus an optional high-resolution Link-only cascade, composited deferred over the scene with Bend Studio's Days Gone screen-space shadows layering in per-pixel detail. Adds slope-scaled bias and normal-offset receivers (acne control without peter-panning), automatic indoor disable, and a full live tuning surface. Built on the dynamic shadows demo mod. EXPERIMENTAL
